Profile.aboutMe1:
Saya adalah orang bodoh yang selalu belajar. Tapi mengapa saya selalu bodoh dalam melakukan hal-hal yang mudah. Terkadang gua berfikir 'Apakah gua bermanfaat ?'.
Dont judge a book by its cover
Profile.aboutMe2: I am a fool who is always learning. But why am I always stupid in doing easy things. Sometimes caves think 'Are caves useful?'.

Project.title: Pesan
Project.info: A message for me or something else
